description: Google Business Profile APIs let organizations manage their business listing information on Google, including locations, attributes, categories, chains, and Google-updated location data. The `mybusinessbusinessinformation.googleapis.com` service is the Business Information API endpoint for that data.
summary: 1 HTTP API surface: the Google Business Profile Business Information REST API at `https://mybusinessbusinessinformation.googleapis.com/v1`, authenticated with Google OAuth 2.0 bearer tokens.

surfaces.name: Google Business Profile Business Information API
